problem: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed?
hypothesis: If Dopamine/serotonin reuptake inhibition with specificity is applied to be, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 20 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
